Building and Applying a HOMED Reference

Introduction

This vignette demonstrates the complete HOMED workflow using a PBMC example dataset included with the package.

The workflow consists of:

  1. Loading scRNA-seq, purified methylation, and bulk methylation/expression data.
  2. Generating pseudo-ground-truth cell proportions using DWLS.
  3. Constructing a hierarchical HOMED reference.
  4. Estimating cell-type proportions from bulk methylation data.
  5. Evaluating deconvolution performance.
#library(HOMED)

source("/data/project/lgarmire_lab/HOMED/HOMED/R/HOMED_Estimate_multilevel.r")
source("/data/project/lgarmire_lab/HOMED/HOMED/R/HOMED_Plot_multilevel.r")
source("/data/project/lgarmire_lab/HOMED/HOMED/R/HOMED_Reference_multilevel.r")

suppressWarnings(suppressMessages({
    library(EpiDISH)
    library(ggplot2)
    library(dplyr)
    library(Seurat)
    library(Matrix)
    library(limma)
    library(nlme)
    library(parallel)
    library(doParallel)
    library(foreach)
    library(lumi)
}))

pure_methyl <- readRDS("/data/project/lgarmire_lab/HOMED/HOMED/data/PBMC_pure_methyl.rds")
pure_celltype <- readRDS("/data/project/lgarmire_lab/HOMED/HOMED/data/PBMC_pure_methyl_pdata.rds")
bulk_methyl_train <- readRDS("/data/project/lgarmire_lab/HOMED/HOMED/data/PBMC_bulk_methyl_train.rds")
bulk_cellprop_train <- readRDS("/data/project/lgarmire_lab/HOMED/HOMED/data/PBMC_bulk_cellprop_train.rds")

dim(pure_methyl)
#> [1] 452402     40
dim(pure_celltype)
#> [1] 40  2
dim(bulk_methyl_train)
#> [1] 452402    224
dim(bulk_cellprop_train)
#> [1] 224   5
two_level_celltypes <- list(
    mono = NULL,
    t = c("cd4t", "cd8t"),
    nk = NULL,
    b = NULL
)

ref <- HOMED_Reference(
    FACS_beta = pure_methyl, 
    FACS_pd = pure_celltype, 
    training_beta = bulk_methyl_train, 
    training_prop = bulk_cellprop_train, 
    celltypes = two_level_celltypes
)
#> === Building Level 1 References ===
#> Running limma for t vs others...
#> Running limma for b vs others...
#> Running limma for nk vs others...
#> Running limma for mono vs others...
#> Selected 1739 unique probes across all cell types
#> Estimating coefficients using validationCellType (4 cell types)
#> Reference building complete!
#> Optimizing reference for level 1 cell type: t
#> [1] "Final Library - t : Avg Cell-RMSE = 0.0533 ; Cell-PCC = 0.8133"
#> Optimizing reference for level 1 cell type: b
#> [1] "Final Library - b : Avg Cell-RMSE = 0.0283 ; Cell-PCC = 0.8328"
#> Optimizing reference for level 1 cell type: nk
#> [1] "Final Library - nk : Avg Cell-RMSE = 0.0331 ; Cell-PCC = 0.8461"
#> Optimizing reference for level 1 cell type: mono
#> [1] "Final Library - mono : Avg Cell-RMSE = 0.0462 ; Cell-PCC = 0.8493"
#> === Building Level 2 References ===
#> Running limma for cd4t vs others...
#> Running limma for b vs others...
#> Running limma for cd8t vs others...
#> Running limma for nk vs others...
#> Running limma for mono vs others...
#> Selected 2099 unique probes across all cell types
#> Estimating coefficients using validationCellType (5 cell types)
#> Reference building complete!
#> Optimizing reference for level 2 cell type: cd4t
#> [1] "Final Library - cd4t : Avg Cell-RMSE = 0.046 ; Cell-PCC = 0.7877"
#> Optimizing reference for level 2 cell type: b
#> [1] "Final Library - b : Avg Cell-RMSE = 0.0276 ; Cell-PCC = 0.7702"
#> Optimizing reference for level 2 cell type: cd8t
#> [1] "Final Library - cd8t : Avg Cell-RMSE = 0.0311 ; Cell-PCC = 0.7961"
#> Optimizing reference for level 2 cell type: nk
#> [1] "Final Library - nk : Avg Cell-RMSE = 0.0329 ; Cell-PCC = 0.785"
#> Optimizing reference for level 2 cell type: mono
#> [1] "Final Library - mono : Avg Cell-RMSE = 0.0471 ; Cell-PCC = 0.7911"
#> 
#> === Reference building complete! ===
bulk_methyl_test <- readRDS("/data/project/lgarmire_lab/HOMED/HOMED/data/PBMC_bulk_methyl_test.rds")

est_bulk_test <- HOMED_Estimate(
    celltypes = two_level_celltypes,
    deconv_beta = bulk_methyl_test,
    reference_obj = ref
)$deconvolution_proportion
#> === Level 1 Deconvolution ===
#> Deconvolving level 1 cell type: mono
#> Deconvolving level 1 cell type: t
#> Deconvolving level 1 cell type: nk
#> Deconvolving level 1 cell type: b
#> === Level 2 Deconvolution ===
#> Deconvolving level 2 cell type: cd4t
#> Deconvolving level 2 cell type: cd8t
#> 
#> === Merging hierarchical results ===
#> Deconvolution complete!
meta_test <- readRDS("/data/project/lgarmire_lab/HOMED/HOMED/data/PBMC_bulk_cellprop_test.rds")

cts <- intersect(colnames(meta_test), colnames(est_bulk_test))

data.frame(
    CellType = cts,
    PCC = sapply(
        cts,
        function(ct) cor(meta_test[,ct], est_bulk_test[,ct])
    ),
    RMSE = sapply(
        cts,
        function(ct)
            sqrt(mean((meta_test[,ct]-est_bulk_test[,ct])^2))
    )
)
#>      CellType       PCC       RMSE
#> nk         nk 0.8676359 0.03674044
#> cd4t     cd4t 0.5668417 0.05006928
#> cd8t     cd8t 0.6701308 0.03322634
#> b           b 0.9354364 0.02454532
#> mono     mono 0.8222959 0.04082628
